blocks.text: Picking up the logistics side of Laura Bradley's note so it does not wait on the client answer. The working media list and the announcement calendar are both started and line up with the phasing we set at kickoff.

Once Kimberly Le's landscape read is final I will rank the priority outlets against it, so reach drives the order rather than a guess. The calendar is drafted to that same sequence and easy to shift once the outlets are set.

The one thing still blocking me is on Sandra Mcdaniel's side: the list of {{fact:f:E-2022-001.client}} spokespeople and any outlets they would rather we not approach. That unlocks the first window; everything after it keys off those two answers.
